hero.kicker: {asn} · our own network in Europe · 60s provisioning
hero.description: VPS, bare metal and DDoS mitigation over our own network. NVMe Gen4, 10 Gbps uplinks and presence in strategic European regions. No waiting, no surprises.

0.label: Network peers
0.context: Direct interconnection at the leading European IXPs for minimal latency.

1.label: Per server
1.context: Guaranteed uplink with no overselling, from the smallest VPS to bare metal.

2.label: DDoS Mitigation
2.context: Always-on filtering capacity at the edge, included in every plan.

provisionTerminal.title: This happens when you hit “Deploy”.
provisionTerminal.description: No tickets, no queues, no human intervention. The system allocates, installs and connects your server while you read this sentence.
provisionTerminal.footnote: ↳ This is what happens <accent>54 seconds</accent> after you pay.

0.label: CPU boost
0.copy: Latest-generation AMD EPYC and Ryzen. Single-thread performance that never falls short.

1.label: NVMe Gen4
1.copy: Storage that feeds the CPU with no bottlenecks. Zero slow disks.

2.label: Network per server
2.copy: Dedicated, symmetric uplink. Bandwidth isn't an add-on, it's the baseline.

productsGrid.title: Choose your starting point.
productsGrid.description: Compute on the same network and the same protection. Start small and scale without migrating.

networkBackbone.title: Our own network, not rented.
networkBackbone.description: We operate our own autonomous system with direct peering at the leading European IXPs. Fewer hops, lower latency and routes we control end to end.

whyUs.title: The data rules. Everything else is noise.
whyUs.description: No stock iconography or empty promises: every reason is a figure you can verify.

0.label: Real deploy
0.body: From payment to a live server in under a minute. No queues, no manual approval.

1.label: DDoS Mitigation
1.body: Always-on filtering at the network edge. You don't pay extra to stay protected.

2.label: NVMe everywhere
2.body: Every plan, down to the smallest, boots on NVMe Gen4. Zero spinning disks in compute.

3.label: Network per server
3.body: 10 Gbps uplinks with no overselling. The bandwidth you see is the bandwidth you get.

4.label: EU regions
4.body: Distributed presence across Europe with direct peering at the major IXPs.

5.label: Human support
5.body: Engineering on call around the clock. Average response under 10 minutes on incidents.

useCases.title: Built for real workloads.
useCases.description: From an API launching today to a multi-region SaaS platform. The same network underneath.

bullets.0: Deploy in 60 s on NVMe Gen4

ddos.title: The attack arrives. To your server, <accent>nothing</accent>.
ddos.diagramLabel: DDoS mitigation diagram: attack traffic is filtered at the shield and only clean traffic reaches the server.

finalCta.note: provisioning in 60s · no setup · cancel anytime
